name: Bond Amount Reduction for Wine Credits

eligibility.description: Proprietors of bonded wine cellars eligible for the small domestic producer wine tax credit or other credits under section 5041(c).

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can calculate their required bond penal sum by taking into account the section 5041(c) tax credits, effectively reducing the capital tied up in surety bonds.
